title: china can't use it
body:
How to config registry-mirrors like docker,otherwise ,china can't use it pull image,Because of the Great Wall Firewall

```
[root@ssr-2 ~]# cat /etc/docker/daemon.json 
{
  "registry-mirrors": ["https://uyah70su.mirror.aliyuncs.com"]
}
```

comments.body:
Hi @willzhang, thanks for reaching out. Starting with podman v1.4.1, you can configure the `/etc/containers/registries.conf` as described in the man pages (see https://github.com/containers/image/blob/master/docs/containers-registries.conf.5.md).

In this specific case, you need to set `/etc/containers/registries.conf` (assuming you want to mirror docker.io) as follows:
```toml
unqualified-search-registries = ["docker.io"]

[[registry]]
prefix = "docker.io"
location = "uyah70su.mirror.aliyuncs.com"
```

i don't know how to install podman v1.4.x ,is there a easy way ,i use ius.io repo ,it seems no v1.4.x rpm

my os is centos7
@lsm5, do you know about the state in centos 7?

sorry ,i not use the offical repo for centos before, just CentOS-Base.repo is ok

```
[root@localhost containers]# podman version
Version:            1.4.4
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.3
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```
